parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'snapshot', row_to_json(s),
  'recent_critical', (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (SELECT event_type, severity, occurred_at, source_ip, description FROM security_events WHERE severity IN ('critical','high') AND resolved = false ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 20) t),
  'top_ips_24h', (SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.hits DESC) FROM (SELECT source_ip, count(*) AS hits, count(*) FILTER (WHERE result IN ('denied','error')) AS denied FROM access_log WHERE occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND source_ip IS NOT NULL GROUP BY source_ip ORDER BY hits DESC LIMIT 10) t),
  'blocklist_active', (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (SELECT source_ip, hit_count, reason, blocked_until FROM ip_blocklist WHERE blocked_until > now() ORDER BY hit_count DESC LIMIT 10) t),
  'blocklist_count', (SELECT count(*) FROM ip_blocklist WHERE blocked_until > now()),
  'banned_24h', (SELECT count(*) FROM ip_blocklist WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL '24 hours')
) AS report
FROM security_dashboard s;
